warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The role play scenario was not described, nor were any issues identified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the role play scenario was outlined, or the core issues were identified, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both the role play scenario was clearly presented, and the central problems were identified.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Shows a thorough grasp of the role play scenario and precisely articulates the problems that need resolution.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No possible solutions were suggested.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more alternative solutions were presented, but their advantages or disadvantages were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two alternative solutions were offered, with a discussion of their respective benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several alternative solutions were proposed, and a comprehensive analysis of multiple advantages and disadvantages was provided for each.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution was offered, but a strategy for putting it into practice was missing.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible solution was presented, along with a well-thought-out plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution and a detailed implementation strategy were created, including the identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas:
criteria.description: This assesses familiarity with key subject areas, including fundamental concepts and practices, basic vocabulary, government rules, financial offerings, technological aspects, various institutional structures, ethical considerations, career paths in finance, and tax principles.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the knowledge areas was evident.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was shown in one or two of the specified knowledge areas.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was shown in three of the specified knowledge areas.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was shown in four or more of the specified knowledge areas.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) did not seem ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) were prepared, but the flow of information was not coherent.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and all statements were clearly structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the listed presentation skills were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified presentation skills (self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, or effective voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified presentation skills (self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, or effective voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All presentation skills were demonstrated, significantly improving the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presenter was unable to respond to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to questions were incomplete.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to questions were thorough.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter engaged with the judges while providing comprehensive answers to all questions.
